title: PacBio (PACB) Preliminary Q4 Revenues Boosted by Revio Sales
text: PacBio's Q4 2023 earnings results were boosted by strong Revio system sales and consumable revenue. Fourth-quarter 2023 total revenues were estimated to be $58.4 million, up 113% year over year, exceeding the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $54.1 million. PacBio shipped a record number of sequencers in 2023, including 173 Revio systems. The company announced record fourth quarter preliminary consumable revenue of $18.9 million as demand for long-read sequencing grows. PacBio shipped 44 Revio sequencing systems for revenue during Q4 2023, bringing the Revio installed base to 173 systems as of December 31, 2023. During the quarter, PacBio released SMRT Link 13.0 software on the Revio system, which includes adaptive loading feature for consistent run performance, run preview for improved lab efficiency and expanded application support. In October, the company began shipment of Kinnex RNA kits, enabling scalable, cost-effective full-length RNA sequencing on Revio and Sequel IIe. PacBio continues to target compound annual revenue growth of 40% to 50% through 2026 based on a 2022 revenue base of $128.3 million, representing a 2026 revenue target of over $500 million.
